searchQuery.title: Search query
searchQuery.description: Company name, SIC keyword, or city to search for.

maxItems.title: Max items
maxItems.description: Maximum number of company records to return.

location.title: Location filter
location.description: City or province filter, e.g. 'Rotterdam' or 'Noord-Holland'.

includeContactDetails.title: Include contact details
includeContactDetails.description: Scrape phone, email, and website from detail pages. Slower and uses more compute.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Apify proxy configuration. Auto-populated in Apify Console.
